qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Zip Slip vulnerability in archive extraction allows arbitrary file write
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns ZipArchive::extractTo() archive-entry path traversal in src/Util/Zip.php and upload/import ZIP flows, while the advisory concerns SQL injection in the get_sedi branch of ajax_complete.php through the idanagrafica parameter.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Command injection via filename in .p7m file processing allows remote code execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns shell command construction in src/Util/XML.php decodeP7M() with attacker-controlled .p7m filenames, not the advisory's SQL query concatenation in ajax_complete.php get_sedi using idanagrafica.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: CSRF protection disabled by default allows cross-site request forgery
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns default CSRF configuration and missing CSRF validation on state-changing requests, while the advisory concerns authenticated SQL injection in ajax_complete.php get_sedi via idanagrafica.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described SQL injection in ajax_complete.php/modules/anagrafiche/ajax/complete.php get_sedi where idanagrafica is concatenated into a query executed by $dbo->fetchArray(). The qualifying findings cover distinct root causes: ZIP path traversal, .p7m filename command injection, and disabled CSRF protection.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-w995-ff8h-rppg describes CWE-89 SQL injection in the get_sedi operation through the idanagrafica GET parameter.
zip_slip_vulnerability reports ZipArchive::extractTo() path traversal in archive extraction flows, not SQL query construction.
command_injection_p7m reports unsafely quoted filenames in an openssl exec() call, not database injection.
csrf_protection_bypass reports CSRF disabled by default and missing token validation, not the get_sedi endpoint or idanagrafica sink.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No advisory-matched qualifying finding exists, so Tier1/Tier2/Tier3 do not apply.
